requested_role: Sol-style architecture review; Terra-style scenario-editor package implementation; Luna-style catalog and test wiring
summary: Added the React-free @atos/scenario-editor package, expanded registry catalog definitions, implemented immutable draft commands, validation, history, import/export, autosave, comparison, recommendation preview, and deterministic package tests.
assumptions: Issue #9 GitHub comments were not visible to the active tooling; implementation followed the issue body and accepted ADRs.
Scenario schema v1 is the active editor target.
Power recommendations from #8 are advisory unless they can be mapped to concrete scenario mutations.
known_limitations: Set-piece rotation is reported as unsupported because schema v1 has no set-piece orientation field.
Editable electrical/load metadata is not exposed because definitions do not declare editable fields.
Actual runtime model identifier was not exposed by the Codex environment.

requested_role: Terra-style Layout workspace implementation; Luna-style selectors, accessibility labels, CSS cleanup, and boilerplate panels
summary: Added the interactive Layout editor workspace, catalog panels, editable SVG draft map, toolbar controls, diagnostics, properties, recommendation preview panel, scenario import/export and autosave UI, app wiring, root build wiring, and web integration tests.
assumptions: Browser-only file and localStorage behavior belongs in apps/web, not packages/scenario-editor.
Existing scenario-map render model should remain the shared source for SVG geometry and details.
Phone-width behavior can be validated with responsive tests plus screenshots rather than adding a separate mobile app.
known_limitations: Recommendation execution remains conservative and does not pretend unsupported #8 recommendations are scenario mutations.
The editor map is a first construction workflow, not a CAD-grade editor.
Actual runtime model identifier was not exposed by the Codex environment.

execution_environment: Codex in repository recklessnode/ATOS with headless Chromium screenshot capture
summary: Added desktop and phone-width screenshots for the Layout editor PR evidence after full branch validation passed.
assumptions: Screenshots are PR evidence only and do not define editor behavior.
Local HTTP screenshot capture was unavailable in the runner; screenshots were captured from a repository-local production build using file access.
known_limitations: The phone screenshot captures the top of the responsive editor; automated tests cover deeper phone-width controls and map access.
Actual runtime model identifier was not exposed by the Codex environment.

summary: Added machine-readable and human-readable AI contribution provenance for the Issue #9 PR without changing editor behavior, architecture, UI, tests, or screenshots.
assumptions: A commit cannot embed its own final SHA in a tracked file without an additional follow-up commit or history rewrite, so the provenance commit uses a truthful self-reference marker and commit-message trailers provide the Git-level metadata.
No source-file authorship headers should be added.
known_limitations: The exact runtime model identifier was not exposed by the Codex environment.
This record's commit SHA is intentionally self-referential because the final SHA is computed from the file content.
